image_prompt_master: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface.
image_prompt_scene: scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge.
image_prompt_characters: character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand.
image_prompt_props: prop lock: Red Mug (mug_red_v1), state: on table, must remain visually consistent.
image_prompt_shot: shot S032. camera intent: comic_panel_03. action beats: Lin Che's face shows realization, eyes widening.; He whispers to himself, understanding dawning. narration intent: Narrator explains "He finally understands: the clues were not left by someone else, but by his past self.". dialogue mood: Protagonist A says "I trapped myself.". shot positive notes: Medium close-up of Lin Che's face, expression of epiphany, soft kitchen light, red mug in foreground, contemplative mood, cinematic lighting.
image_prompt_final: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge. character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand. prop lock: Red Mug (mug_red_v1), state: on table, must remain visually consistent. shot S032. camera intent: comic_panel_03. action beats: Lin Che's face shows realization, eyes widening.; He whispers to himself, understanding dawning. narration intent: Narrator explains "He finally understands: the clues were not left by someone else, but by his past self.". dialogue mood: Protagonist A says "I trapped myself.". shot positive notes: Medium close-up of Lin Che's face, expression of epiphany, soft kitchen light, red mug in foreground, contemplative mood, cinematic lighting.
negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, blurry, overexposed, distracting background., face drift, outfit change, prop drift, wrong set layout, extra fingers, text artifacts, subtitles burned into image, logo, watermark

table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp
rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: He finally understands: the clues were not left by someone else, but by his past self.

manual_workflow.external_generation: paste image_prompt_final and negative_prompt into any web image/video tool; upload reference_images when supported
